//: Deployable apps, consumed by scripts/deploy-env.sh + deploy-apps.yml. Generic: add an app by adding an entry. `environments` lists which of main|labs|staging|production this app deploys to. `worker` is the Cloudflare Worker base name (production = `<worker>`, other envs = `<worker>-<env>`); `outDir` is its bundle output (repo-relative). `notFoundHandling` is the Workers Static Assets 404 behavior: `single-page-application` for client-routed SPAs, `404-page` for multi-page static sites (serves /404.html), `none` otherwise. NOTE: the example-app entries (todomvc/tasks/testbench) are provisional — their bundleTask/outDir/worker are confirmed as part of the Cloudflare Pages -> Workers migration (see docs/design/app-release-spec.md).
